meaning: n.<俚>废话,瞎说adj.无聊的,乏味的
examples: They said, 'Come in, sit down, blah, blah, blah, sign here'.
Blah, blah... See, I can even recite it.

Pretty much in line with the study: decent for small stocks and blah for bonds.
